component.name: IptvScene

Label.text: Left/Right switch columns OK select/play * actions Replay refresh Back providers
Favorites and recents are saved locally. IPTV-org is included as the built-in playlist source.

component.script:
function init() m.top.setFocus(true)
m.titleLabel = m.top.findNode("titleLabel") m.providerLabel = m.top.findNode("providerLabel") m.messageBackground = m.top.findNode("messageBackground") m.statusLabel = m.top.findNode("statusLabel") m.hintLabel = m.top.findNode("hintLabel") m.groupHeader = m.top.findNode("groupHeader") m.channelHeader = m.top.findNode("channelHeader") m.guideHeader = m.top.findNode("guideHeader") m.groupList = m.top.findNode("groupList") m.channelList = m.top.findNode("channelList") m.guideList = m.top.findNode("guideList") m.footerLabel = m.top.findNode("footerLabel") m.debugLabel = m.top.findNode("debugLabel") m.overlay = m.top.findNode("overlay") m.overlayTitle = m.top.findNode("overlayTitle") m.overlayHint = m.top.findNode("overlayHint") m.overlayList = m.top.findNode("overlayList") m.videoPlayer = m.top.findNode("videoPlayer") m.loadTask = m.top.findNode("loadTask")
m.titleLabel.font.size = 30 m.providerLabel.font.size = 24 m.statusLabel.font.size = 18 m.hintLabel.font.size = 18 m.groupHeader.font.size = 22 m.channelHeader.font.size = 22 m.guideHeader.font.size = 22 m.footerLabel.font.size = 18 m.debugLabel.font.size = 16 m.overlayTitle.font.size = 28 m.overlayHint.font.size = 18
m.groupList.observeField("itemSelected", "onGroupSelected") m.channelList.observeField("itemSelected", "onChannelSelected") m.channelList.observeField("itemFocused", "onChannelFocused") m.overlayList.observeField("itemSelected", "onOverlaySelected") m.videoPlayer.observeField("state", "onVideoStateChanged") m.loadTask.observeField("response", "onCatalogLoaded")
m.state = IptvProviderStore_LoadState() m.catalog = invalid m.visibleChannels = [] m.currentGroupKey = "All" m.currentProviderId = "" m.focusArea = "group" m.overlayMode = "" m.dialogMode = "" m.pendingConfig = invalid m.isLoading = false m.debugHistory = []
updateFocusHeaders() bootstrap() end function
sub bootstrap() if m.state.providers.Count() = 0 then showLoadingPlaceholders("Sample feed is ready to install.") showSetupOverlay() showStatus("info", "Add a provider to start browsing live TV.") else providerId = m.state.selectedProviderId if providerId = "" then providerId = m.state.providers[0].id loadProvider(providerId) end if end sub
function onKeyEvent(key as String, press as Boolean) as Boolean if not press then return false
if m.videoPlayer.visible then if key = "back" or key = "OK" or key = "options" then stopPlayback() return true end if return true end if
if m.overlay.visible then if key = "back" or key = "options" or key = "left" then closeOverlay() return true end if return false end if
if key = "left" then setFocusArea("group") return true else if key = "right" then setFocusArea("channel") return true else if key = "options" then showActionsOverlay() return true else if key = "back" then showProviderOverlay() return true else if key = "replay" then refreshCurrentProvider() return true end if
return false end function
sub loadProvider(providerId as Dynamic) provider = Iptv_FindProviderById(m.state.providers, providerId) if provider = invalid then showLoadingPlaceholders("Choose a provider to continue.") showSetupOverlay() showStatus("error", "No provider is configured yet.") return end if
if m.isLoading then return m.isLoading = true m.currentProviderId = provider.id m.providerLabel.text = provider.title + " [" + Iptv_Upper(provider.kind) + "]" options = Iptv_GetProviderOptions(provider) if options.largeFeed then showLoadingPlaceholders("Loading built-in playlist ...") showStatus("info", "Loading built-in playlist from " + Iptv_HostLabel(provider.endpoint) + " ...") else showLoadingPlaceholders("Loading channels and guide data ...") showStatus("info", "Loading provider data from " + Iptv_HostLabel(provider.endpoint) + " ...") end if appendDebug("Load started: " + provider.title) m.loadTask.request = { provider: provider } m.loadTask.control = "RUN" end sub
sub onCatalogLoaded() response = m.loadTask.response if response = invalid then return
m.isLoading = false m.catalog = response stageLabel = "" if response.DoesExist("metadata") and response.metadata <> invalid and response.metadata.DoesExist("stage") then stageLabel = Iptv_SafeString(response.metadata.stage) end if selectedProviderId = Iptv_SafeString(response.providerId) if selectedProviderId = "" then selectedProviderId = m.currentProviderId m.state = IptvProviderStore_SetSelectedProvider(m.state, selectedProviderId) IptvProviderStore_SaveState(m.state)
groups = ["All", "Favorites", "Recents"] for each groupTitle in response.groups groups.Push(groupTitle) end for
rows = [] for each groupTitle in groups meta = "Filter" if groupTitle = "Favorites" then meta = m.state.favorites.Count().ToStr() + " saved" if groupTitle = "Recents" then meta = m.state.recents.Count().ToStr() + " recent" rows.Push({ title: groupTitle, meta: meta, key: groupTitle }) end for m.groupList.content = Iptv_NewListContent(rows)
if response.channels.Count() = 0 then errorMessage = "This provider returned no live channels." if response.errors.Count() > 0 then errorMessage = response.errors[0] showStatus("error", errorMessage) if stageLabel <> "" then appendDebug("Load failed at " + stageLabel + ": " + errorMessage) else appendDebug("Load failed: " + errorMessage) end if else if response.metadata.DoesExist("isPartial") and response.metadata.isPartial then loadedCount = response.channels.Count().ToStr() showStatus("success", "Showing first " + loadedCount + " channels from " + response.providerTitle + ".") if stageLabel <> "" then appendDebug("Load finished at " + stageLabel + ": partial catalog with " + loadedCount + " channels") else appendDebug("Load finished: partial catalog with " + loadedCount + " channels") end if else if response.errors.Count() > 0 then showStatus("warn", response.errors[0]) if stageLabel <> "" then appendDebug("Load warning at " + stageLabel + ": " + response.errors[0]) else appendDebug("Load warning: " + response.errors[0]) end if else showStatus("success", response.channels.Count().ToStr() + " live channels ready.") if stageLabel <> "" then appendDebug("Load finished at " + stageLabel + ": " + response.channels.Count().ToStr() + " channels") else appendDebug("Load finished: " + response.channels.Count().ToStr() + " channels") end if end if
m.currentGroupKey = "All" refreshVisibleChannels() setFocusArea("group") end sub
sub refreshVisibleChannels() m.visibleChannels = [] if m.catalog = invalid then showEmptyState("No channels", "Load a provider first", "Guide unavailable", "Select a channel to inspect schedule") return end if
if m.currentGroupKey = "Favorites" then for each channel in m.catalog.channels if Iptv_ArrayContains(m.state.favorites, channel.id) then m.visibleChannels.Push(channel) end for else if m.currentGroupKey = "Recents" then channelById = {} for each channel in m.catalog.channels channelById[channel.id] = channel end for for each recentId in m.state.recents if channelById.DoesExist(recentId) then m.visibleChannels.Push(channelById[recentId]) end for else if m.currentGroupKey = "All" then m.visibleChannels = m.catalog.channels else for each channel in m.catalog.channels if Iptv_SafeString(channel.group) = m.currentGroupKey then m.visibleChannels.Push(channel) end for end if
rows = [] for each channel in m.visibleChannels badge = "" if Iptv_ArrayContains(m.state.favorites, channel.id) then badge = "Fav" meta = Iptv_SafeString(channel.group) + " | " + Iptv_SafeString(channel.metadata.nowTitle) rows.Push({ title: channel.title, meta: meta, key: channel.id, badge: badge }) end for
if rows.Count() = 0 then showEmptyState("No channels", "This filter is currently empty", "Guide unavailable", "Choose another filter or provider") return end if m.channelList.content = Iptv_NewListContent(rows) updateGuideForFocusedChannel() end sub
sub onGroupSelected() content = m.groupList.content if content = invalid then return
focused = m.groupList.itemSelected if focused < 0 or focused >= content.GetChildCount() then return selectedNode = content.GetChild(focused) if selectedNode = invalid then return
m.currentGroupKey = Iptv_SafeString(selectedNode.key) refreshVisibleChannels() setFocusArea("channel") end sub
sub onChannelSelected() playFocusedChannel() end sub
sub onChannelFocused() updateGuideForFocusedChannel() end sub
sub updateGuideForFocusedChannel() if m.visibleChannels.Count() = 0 then m.guideList.content = Iptv_NewListContent([{ title: "Guide unavailable", meta: "No channel is selected", key: "" }]) return end if
focused = m.channelList.itemFocused if focused < 0 or focused >= m.visibleChannels.Count() then focused = 0 channel = m.visibleChannels[focused] m.channelHeader.text = "Channels | " + channel.title
programs = [] if m.catalog.guideByChannel.DoesExist(channel.id) then programs = m.catalog.guideByChannel[channel.id]
guideRows = [] if programs.Count() = 0 then if m.catalog.metadata.DoesExist("guideDeferred") and m.catalog.metadata.guideDeferred then guideRows.Push({ title: channel.title, meta: "Guide deferred for large source", key: "" }) else guideRows.Push({ title: channel.title, meta: "Guide unavailable for this channel", key: "" }) end if guideRows.Push({ title: "Source", meta: Iptv_SafeString(channel.streamUrl), key: "" }) appendDebug("Guide unavailable: " + channel.title) else limit = programs.Count() if limit > 5 then limit = 5 for i = 0 to limit - 1 program = programs[i] timeLabel = Iptv_FormatClock(program.startTime) if Iptv_IsNonEmptyString(program.endTime) then timeLabel = timeLabel + "-" + Iptv_FormatClock(program.endTime) meta = timeLabel if Iptv_IsNonEmptyString(program.description) then meta = meta + " | " + program.description guideRows.Push({ title: program.title, meta: meta, key: "" }) end for end if
m.guideList.content = Iptv_NewListContent(guideRows) end sub
sub playFocusedChannel() if m.visibleChannels.Count() = 0 then return focused = m.channelList.itemFocused if focused < 0 or focused >= m.visibleChannels.Count() then focused = 0 channel = m.visibleChannels[focused]
target = IptvPlaybackService_Resolve(channel) if not Iptv_IsNonEmptyString(target.streamUrl) then showStatus("error", "This channel does not have a playable stream URL.") appendDebug("Playback blocked: missing URL") return end if
content = CreateObject("roSGNode", "ContentNode") content.url = target.streamUrl content.title = channel.title if target.streamFormat <> "" then content.streamFormat = target.streamFormat
m.videoPlayer.content = content m.videoPlayer.visible = true m.videoPlayer.control = "play"
m.state = IptvProviderStore_RememberRecent(m.state, channel.id) m.state = IptvProviderStore_RememberLastWatched(m.state, channel.providerId, channel.id) IptvProviderStore_SaveState(m.state) showStatus("success", "Playing " + channel.title) appendDebug("Playback started: " + channel.title) end sub
sub stopPlayback() m.videoPlayer.control = "stop" m.videoPlayer.visible = false appendDebug("Playback stopped") setFocusArea("channel") end sub
sub onVideoStateChanged() currentState = m.videoPlayer.state if currentState = "error" then stopPlayback() showStatus("error", "Playback failed for the selected stream.") appendDebug("Playback failed") else if currentState = "finished" then stopPlayback() else if currentState = "playing" then appendDebug("Video state: playing") else if currentState = "buffering" then appendDebug("Video state: buffering") end if end sub
sub refreshCurrentProvider() if Iptv_IsNonEmptyString(m.currentProviderId) then loadProvider(m.currentProviderId) end sub
sub setFocusArea(area as Dynamic) m.focusArea = Iptv_SafeString(area) updateFocusHeaders() if m.focusArea = "channel" then m.channelList.setFocus(true) else m.groupList.setFocus(true) end if end sub
sub updateFocusHeaders() groupColor = "0xFFF2A8FF" channelColor = "0xFFF2A8FF" if m.focusArea = "group" then groupColor = "0x7FD8FFFF" else if m.focusArea = "channel" then channelColor = "0x7FD8FFFF" end if m.groupHeader.color = groupColor m.channelHeader.color = channelColor end sub
sub showStatus(kind as Dynamic, message as Dynamic) resolvedKind = Iptv_Lower(kind) panelColor = "0x20405AFF" if resolvedKind = "success" then panelColor = "0x1B5E3BFF" else if resolvedKind = "warn" then panelColor = "0x705A14FF" else if resolvedKind = "error" then panelColor = "0x7A2424FF" end if
textValue = Iptv_SafeString(message) m.statusLabel.text = textValue m.messageBackground.color = panelColor m.messageBackground.visible = textValue <> "" end sub
sub showSetupOverlay() rows = [ { title: "Use Built-In Playlist", meta: "Install the IPTV-org public playlist as a provider", key: "setup:default" }, { title: "Add M3U Playlist", meta: "Enter a remote M3U playlist URL", key: "setup:m3u" }, { title: "Add Xtream Provider", meta: "Enter Xtream server URL, username, and password", key: "setup:xtream" } ] openOverlay("Provider Setup", "Choose a source to configure.", rows, "setup") end sub
sub showProviderOverlay() rows = [] for each provider in m.state.providers key = "provider:" + provider.id rows.Push({ title: provider.title, meta: provider.kind + " | " + Iptv_HostLabel(provider.endpoint), key: key }) end for rows.Push({ title: "Use Built-In Playlist", meta: "Add or restore the IPTV-org playlist provider", key: "setup:default" }) rows.Push({ title: "Add M3U Playlist", meta: "Enter a custom playlist URL", key: "setup:m3u" }) rows.Push({ title: "Add Xtream Provider", meta: "Configure Xtream credentials", key: "setup:xtream" }) openOverlay("Providers", "Select a provider or add a new one.", rows, "providers") end sub
sub showActionsOverlay() rows = [ { title: "Switch Providers", meta: "Open configured providers", key: "action:providers" }, { title: "Refresh Current Provider", meta: "Reload channels and guide", key: "action:refresh" }, { title: "Toggle Favorite", meta: "Add or remove the focused channel", key: "action:favorite" }, { title: "Add M3U Playlist", meta: "Configure another playlist URL", key: "setup:m3u" }, { title: "Add Xtream Provider", meta: "Configure another Xtream source", key: "setup:xtream" } ] openOverlay("Actions", "Provider management and channel actions.", rows, "actions") end sub
sub openOverlay(title as Dynamic, hint as Dynamic, rows as Object, mode as String) m.overlayMode = mode m.overlayTitle.text = Iptv_SafeString(title) m.overlayHint.text = Iptv_SafeString(hint) m.overlayList.content = Iptv_NewListContent(rows) m.overlay.visible = true m.overlayList.setFocus(true) end sub
sub closeOverlay() m.overlay.visible = false m.overlayMode = "" if m.state.providers.Count() = 0 then showSetupOverlay() else setFocusArea(m.focusArea) end if end sub
sub onOverlaySelected() content = m.overlayList.content if content = invalid then return
focused = m.overlayList.itemSelected if focused < 0 or focused >= content.GetChildCount() then return row = content.GetChild(focused) if row = invalid then return
key = Iptv_SafeString(row.key) if Iptv_StartsWith(key, "provider:") then closeOverlay() loadProvider(Iptv_Substring(key, 10)) else if key = "setup:default" then useSampleProvider() else if key = "setup:m3u" then closeOverlay() openTextDialog("m3u-url", "Add M3U Playlist", "Enter a remote M3U playlist URL", "https://") else if key = "setup:xtream" then closeOverlay() m.pendingConfig = {} openTextDialog("xtream-url", "Add Xtream Provider", "Enter the Xtream server URL", "https://") else if key = "action:providers" then showProviderOverlay() else if key = "action:refresh" then closeOverlay() refreshCurrentProvider() else if key = "action:favorite" then closeOverlay() toggleFavoriteFocusedChannel() end if end sub
sub useSampleProvider() provider = Iptv_DefaultProviderConfig() m.state = IptvProviderStore_UpsertProvider(m.state, provider) m.state = IptvProviderStore_SetSelectedProvider(m.state, provider.id) IptvProviderStore_SaveState(m.state) closeOverlay() loadProvider(provider.id) end sub
sub toggleFavoriteFocusedChannel() if m.visibleChannels.Count() = 0 then return focused = m.channelList.itemFocused if focused < 0 or focused >= m.visibleChannels.Count() then focused = 0 channel = m.visibleChannels[focused]
m.state = IptvProviderStore_ToggleFavorite(m.state, channel.id) IptvProviderStore_SaveState(m.state) refreshVisibleChannels()
if Iptv_ArrayContains(m.state.favorites, channel.id) then showStatus("success", channel.title + " was added to favorites.") appendDebug("Favorite added: " + channel.title) else showStatus("info", channel.title + " was removed from favorites.") appendDebug("Favorite removed: " + channel.title) end if end sub
sub openTextDialog(mode as Dynamic, title as Dynamic, message as Dynamic, defaultText as Dynamic) dialog = CreateObject("roSGNode", "KeyboardDialog") dialog.title = Iptv_SafeString(title) dialog.message = Iptv_SafeString(message) dialog.text = Iptv_SafeString(defaultText) dialog.buttons = ["Save", "Cancel"] dialog.observeField("buttonSelected", "onTextDialogClosed") m.dialogMode = Iptv_SafeString(mode) m.top.dialog = dialog end sub
sub onTextDialogClosed() dialog = m.top.dialog if dialog = invalid then return
selected = dialog.buttonSelected textValue = Iptv_Trim(dialog.text) mode = m.dialogMode m.top.dialog = invalid m.dialogMode = ""
if selected <> 0 then return
if mode = "m3u-url" then if not Iptv_IsNonEmptyString(textValue) then showStatus("warn", "M3U URL entry was empty.") return end if m.pendingConfig = { endpoint: textValue } openTextDialog("m3u-guide", "Optional Guide URL", "Enter an XMLTV URL, or leave blank to rely on the playlist header", "") else if mode = "m3u-guide" then endpoint = Iptv_SafeString(m.pendingConfig.endpoint) title = Iptv_HostLabel(endpoint) provider = Iptv_NewProviderConfig("m3u", title, endpoint, "", "", textValue) saveAndLoadProvider(provider) else if mode = "xtream-url" then if not Iptv_IsNonEmptyString(textValue) then showStatus("warn", "Xtream server URL entry was empty.") return end if m.pendingConfig.endpoint = textValue openTextDialog("xtream-user", "Xtream Username", "Enter the Xtream username", "") else if mode = "xtream-user" then m.pendingConfig.username = textValue openTextDialog("xtream-pass", "Xtream Password", "Enter the Xtream password", "") else if mode = "xtream-pass" then endpoint = Iptv_SafeString(m.pendingConfig.endpoint) title = Iptv_HostLabel(endpoint) provider = Iptv_NewProviderConfig("xtream", title, endpoint, m.pendingConfig.username, textValue, "") saveAndLoadProvider(provider) end if end sub
sub saveAndLoadProvider(provider as Object) m.state = IptvProviderStore_UpsertProvider(m.state, provider) m.state = IptvProviderStore_SetSelectedProvider(m.state, provider.id) IptvProviderStore_SaveState(m.state) m.pendingConfig = invalid appendDebug("Provider saved: " + provider.title) loadProvider(provider.id) end sub
sub showLoadingPlaceholders(message as Dynamic) m.groupList.content = Iptv_NewListContent([ { title: "Loading", meta: Iptv_SafeString(message), key: "" } ]) m.channelList.content = Iptv_NewListContent([ { title: "Loading channels", meta: "Please wait", key: "" } ]) m.guideList.content = Iptv_NewListContent([ { title: "Loading guide", meta: "Please wait", key: "" } ]) end sub
sub showEmptyState(channelTitle as Dynamic, channelMeta as Dynamic, guideTitle as Dynamic, guideMeta as Dynamic) m.channelList.content = Iptv_NewListContent([ { title: channelTitle, meta: channelMeta, key: "" } ]) m.guideList.content = Iptv_NewListContent([ { title: guideTitle, meta: guideMeta, key: "" } ]) end sub
sub appendDebug(message as Dynamic) textValue = Iptv_SafeString(message) if textValue = "" then return
m.debugHistory.Push(textValue) while m.debugHistory.Count() > 4 m.debugHistory.Delete(0) end while
latest = m.debugHistory[m.debugHistory.Count() - 1] m.debugLabel.text = "Debug: " + Iptv_Truncate(latest, 120) end sub
